comments.comment: To make this actionable, specify what 'making all personas recursive' entails. Are you referring to behavioral loops, self-updating traits, or dynamic interconnectivity? Also clarify what aspect of Allon OS should be referenced—canvases, active layers, or persona scaffolds?
